old_example: The carpenter used a heavy-duty metal clamp to hold the two pieces of wood together while the glue dried overnight.
new_example: The carpenter used a metal clamp to hold the wood together.
new_translation: Thợ mộc đã sử dụng một cái kẹp kim loại để giữ gỗ.

old_example: There was a loud burst of clapping and cheering from the audience as the performers returned to the stage for their encore.
new_example: There was a loud burst of clapping from the audience.
new_translation: Đã có một tràng vỗ tay lớn từ khán giả.

old_example: Please ask for clarification if you have any questions about the new international remote work policy.
new_example: Please ask for clarification if you have any questions.
new_translation: Vui lòng yêu cầu làm rõ nếu bạn có thắc mắc.

old_example: The manager managed to clarify the terms of the new partnership agreement during the meeting yesterday morning.
new_example: The manager clarified the terms of the agreement during the meeting.
new_translation: Quản lý đã làm rõ các điều khoản trong cuộc họp.

old_example: The manager praised the report for its brevity and clarity in explaining the new international expansion plan.
new_example: The manager praised the report for its brevity and clarity.
new_translation: Quản lý khen ngợi báo cáo vì sự ngắn gọn và rõ ràng.

old_example: A violent clash between protesters and police occurred in the city center area early yesterday afternoon.
new_example: A violent clash between protesters and police occurred yesterday.
new_translation: Một cuộc đụng độ bạo lực giữa người biểu tình và cảnh sát đã xảy ra.
